Metadata.homeDescription: Shop bridal collections, save wishlist favorites, and book private try-on appointments.
Metadata.bookDescription: Request a private bridal try-on appointment with your preferred gown.

Layout.footerTagline: Modern bridal appointments and couture styling.
Layout.footerDescription: A bridal atelier for gowns, makeup, and photo services with clear milestones from consultation to wedding day.
Layout.footerCopyright: © {year} Quỳnh Trâm Bridal. All rights reserved.

Nav.serviceMenuHint: Book any service standalone or bundle them together.

Hero.heading: Bridal pieces shaped with couture precision and a quietly modern spirit.
Hero.description: A luxury bridal house blending editorial taste with intimate service. Discover refined silhouettes, private fittings, and meticulous alteration pathways designed around your timeline.
Hero.clientHeading: One bride, one stylist, full focus.
Hero.clientDescription: Every appointment is paced around body fit, textile education, and styling confidence for ceremony, reception, and post-ceremony moments.

FeaturedSection.heading: Best-loved gowns for private try-on this season.
FeaturedSection.comingSoonNote: Product merchandising can be updated from the admin panel.

ProductDetail.subtitle: One-on-one showroom guidance by appointment
ProductDetail.confirmationNote: Secure appointment confirmation within one business day.
ProductDetail.alterationNote: Alteration timeline and fitting milestones included.
ProductDetail.addOnTitle: You can include Makeup and Photo services directly in your fitting request.

photo.detail: Consultation for pre-wedding or wedding-day photo packages based on your timeline.

ProductDetail.journeyTitle: What you get at each step

confirm.title: Fast confirmation
confirm.detail: Our team confirms your slot and sends preparation notes before the appointment.

fitting.title: Goal-oriented fitting
fitting.detail: Your stylist works from body fit, event concept, and budget range you shared.

aftercare.title: Alteration follow-through
aftercare.detail: Refit milestones and final handoff timing are mapped clearly to your wedding timeline.

ProductDetail.saveToWishlist: Save this gown to your wishlist for account follow-up.

Wishlist.heading: Your wishlist
Wishlist.description: Keep your favorite gowns in one place and book try-on appointments when you are ready.
Wishlist.emptyNote: Start exploring the catalog and add products to shortlist.

Account.heading: Welcome back
Account.description: Manage your try-on bookings, wishlist shortlist, and profile information in one place.
Account.bookingCreated: Booking request submitted successfully. We will follow up shortly.
Account.name: Name

Booking.title: Reserve your private bridal appointment.
Booking.description: Choose a date, share your event timeline, and we will confirm your fitting request with stylist prep notes.
Booking.serviceOnlyHint: You can book Makeup or Photo services without selecting a wedding gown.
Booking.confirmationNote: We send confirmation details with stylist prep guidance after reviewing your preferred date and notes.
Booking.signInPrompt: For account tracking and wishlist sync, please

form.productOptionalNote: You can leave this empty for Makeup/Photo-only bookings.
form.styleNotesPlaceholder: Share venue details, dress preferences, and timeline constraints.

makeup.title: Bridal Makeup
makeup.note: Prioritize this if you want makeup look planning during your fitting process.

photo.title: Wedding Photo
photo.note: Request package consultation for pre-wedding or wedding-day shooting.

validation.weddingDateError: Wedding date must be on or after appointment date.

stylistPrep.title: Stylist preparation
stylistPrep.detail: Your style notes are reviewed ahead of the showroom appointment.

privateFitting.title: Private fitting
privateFitting.detail: Try-on session tailored to silhouette, fit, and ceremony timeline.

aftercare.title: Aftercare planning
aftercare.detail: Alteration milestones and pickup timeline are confirmed with you.

errors.invalidDatetime: Choose a future appointment date and time.
errors.invalidProduct: Selected product is unavailable. Please choose another gown.
errors.serviceUnavailable: Booking service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
errors.slotUnavailable: That time slot has been reserved. Please choose a different appointment time.

ServicesPage.metaDescription: Explore Quỳnh Trâm Bridal's three service lines: bridal gowns, bridal makeup, and wedding photo.
ServicesPage.heading: Three service lines, one team supporting your full wedding journey
ServicesPage.description: Beyond bridal gowns, we provide Makeup and Photo as standalone services so you can book each line independently or combine them into one coordinated plan.

dress.title: Bridal Gowns
dress.summary: Silhouette consultation, private fittings, and alteration milestones aligned to your wedding date.
dress.point1: Style shortlist based on body fit and event concept

makeup.title: Bridal Makeup
makeup.summary: Makeup direction based on skin tone, venue lighting, and final wedding look.
makeup.point1: Makeup style planning for ceremony and reception
makeup.point2: Hair, veil, and accessory harmony guidance

photo.title: Wedding Photo
photo.summary: Photography concept planning with clear timeline, locations, and delivery expectations.
photo.point2: Shot list aligned to your story and mood

step1.title: Step 1: Confirm service scope
step1.detail: Choose the line you need: gown, makeup, photo, or a combined package.

step2.title: Step 2: One-on-one consultation
step2.detail: We align budget, concept, and timeline to build a practical service plan.

step3.title: Step 3: Deliver by milestones
step3.detail: Appointments, tasks, and checkpoints stay transparent from start to finish.

serviceOnly.title: Book services without gown purchase
serviceOnly.description: You do not need to purchase a gown to book Makeup or Photo. The booking flow supports standalone service requests.
serviceOnly.note: In the booking form, simply leave “Preferred gown” empty and choose Makeup/Photo add-ons.

Collections.heading: Signature silhouettes, curated for private appointments.

NotFound.heading: Gown not found
NotFound.description: This product may have been archived or renamed. Browse available collections for current inventory.

HomeHighlights.heading: Clear details so you can plan with confidence
HomeHighlights.intro: Every appointment is grounded in real constraints: sample availability, alteration lead time, and decision checkpoints before the wedding week.
HomeHighlights.coutureDesc: We do not push trends. Stylists shortlist gowns based on your body shape, venue concept, and stated budget range.
HomeHighlights.coutureNote: Each option includes fabric notes, fit behavior, alteration scope, and expected turnaround.
HomeHighlights.fittingDesc: Appointments are one-on-one, starting from baseline silhouettes, then refined for movement, comfort, and ceremony use.
HomeHighlights.fittingNote: After each session you get a concrete next-step summary: shortlisted styles, adjustment points, and return milestones.
HomeHighlights.calendarDesc: Scheduling follows your actual wedding date, with room for alterations, re-fit checks, and contingency.
HomeHighlights.calendarNote: If your timeline is tight, we call out risks early and propose alternatives instead of overpromising.

CollectionsGrid.heading: Signature silhouettes, curated for private appointments.

seraphina.name: Seraphina Satin Wrap
seraphina.note: Contoured seams with soft off-shoulder drape

CollectionsPage.title: Bridal collections
CollectionsPage.description: Explore curated silhouettes, compare pricing, and schedule in-store try-on appointments directly from each product page.
CollectionsPage.noResultsDesc: Try a different keyword or remove filters.

verified.title: Dedicated stylist support
verified.detail: Each appointment is one-on-one, with guidance tailored to fit, wedding style, and your budget plan.

rating.title: Transparent process
rating.detail: Sample availability, stock condition, and alteration cost range are shared before you commit.

timeline.title: Concrete scheduling
timeline.detail: Fitting, alteration, and pickup milestones are confirmed clearly so you can coordinate your wedding plan.

finish.title: Pre-handover quality checks
finish.detail: Before pickup, we review seams, included accessories, and care instructions with you.

Testimonials.heading: Booked with confidence, loved in person.

linh.quote: The stylist understood my ceremony vision immediately. The booking process was clear, and every fitting was perfectly paced.

emily.quote: I shortlisted dresses online, booked in one click, and found my gown in the first appointment. The service felt truly private.

gia.quote: From first message to final alteration, communication was fast and professional. I always knew exactly what was next.

RealBrides.label: Real Brides
RealBrides.title: Maison Etoile Muses
RealBrides.subtitle: Discover the effortless elegance of our brides across the globe.

AboutPage.heroDesc1: Maison Etoile is a bridal atelier focused on modern silhouettes, private fittings, and personalized styling guidance from first appointment to final alteration.
AboutPage.heroDesc2: Every gown consultation is tailored to your ceremony timeline, venue setting, and comfort preferences to ensure a confident and refined wedding-day fit.

consult.title: Style Consultation
consult.desc: Meet your stylist to discuss vision and venue.

alteration.title: Precise Alterations
alteration.desc: Meticulous adjustments for the perfect fit.

MakeupServicePage.metaDescription: Explore Quỳnh Trâm Bridal makeup service details: styles, reference pricing, image examples, and booking process.
MakeupServicePage.heading: Makeup service planned around real wedding timelines and lighting
MakeupServicePage.description: Our makeup team works from your skin tone, venue lighting, dress style, and event flow. You can book Makeup as a standalone service without purchasing a gown.
MakeupServicePage.heroImageAlt: Bridal stylist finishing a makeup look
MakeupServicePage.packageNote: Prices are reference only and may change based on team size, start time, location, and extra requests.

trial.label: Package 1
trial.name: Makeup trial session
trial.desc: Best when you need to finalize your look before the wedding day.
trial.feature1: Tone and style consultation based on face shape and gown concept
trial.feature2: 1 makeup look + basic hair setup at studio
trial.feature3: Written notes to recreate the finalized look on event day

weddingDay.label: Package 2
weddingDay.name: Wedding day makeup
weddingDay.desc: For brides needing hair and makeup support on the ceremony day.
weddingDay.feature2: Light touch-up support before ceremony start
weddingDay.feature3: Suitable for single-event timelines under 6 hours

premium.label: Package 3
premium.name: Premium full-session makeup
premium.desc: Built for long timelines with ceremony and reception transitions.
premium.feature1: 2 look variations for ceremony and reception contexts
premium.feature2: On-site support for touch-up within committed timeline
premium.feature3: Coordination support for hair, veil, and photo accessories

MakeupServicePage.galleryIntro: Some makeup directions brides book most often during the recent wedding season.

look1.alt: Natural bridal makeup style in daylight
look1.caption: Natural soft-skin look suited for outdoor ceremonies and daylight photography.

look2.alt: Bridal makeup with balanced eye focus
look2.caption: Balanced eye-focused look that holds well in close-up and stage lighting.

look3.alt: Private bridal makeup preparation area in showroom
look3.caption: Private preparation area at showroom with one-on-one booking flow.

step1.title: Confirm needs and timeline
step1.detail: You share event date, makeup time window, and preferred style; we propose a fitting package.

step2.title: Trial session (optional)
step2.detail: Trial helps lock base tone, eye direction, lip shade, hairstyle, and accessories before the wedding day.

step3.title: Event day execution
step3.detail: Team arrives on schedule and follows the agreed checklist and timing plan.

includedItems.item1: Tone and look consultation based on skin tone, dress, and wedding concept.
includedItems.item2: Bridal makeup and hair setup based on selected package scope.
includedItems.item3: Guidance to maintain look stability through the event timeline.

excludedItems.item1: Early call-time fee (before 5 AM), distant travel, or overtime outside commitment.
excludedItems.item2: Makeup for family or bridesmaids unless added to package.
excludedItems.item3: External hair accessories, veil rentals, or custom purchases.

MakeupServicePage.supportTitle: Need quick advice on schedule and pricing?
MakeupServicePage.supportDesc: Message us on WhatsApp or Zalo for a quote aligned with your exact wedding timeline.

PhotoServicePage.metaDescription: Explore Quỳnh Trâm Bridal photo service details: concept directions, reference pricing, visuals, and delivery process.
PhotoServicePage.heading: Wedding photography service with clear timeline and deliverables
PhotoServicePage.description: You can book Photo independently without buying a gown. The team supports planning from concept and shot flow to final image delivery milestones.
PhotoServicePage.heroImageAlt: Wedding photography setup with modern bridal styling
PhotoServicePage.packageNote: Prices are reference only and may vary by location, set count, crew size, and post-production scope.

halfDay.label: Package 1
halfDay.name: Pre-wedding Half Day
halfDay.desc: For couples needing a concise photo set in one session.
halfDay.feature3: Shot-list guidance aligned to your selected mood

fullDay.label: Package 2
fullDay.name: Pre-wedding Full Day
fullDay.desc: Ideal for multi-location concepts and outfit changes.
fullDay.feature1: Up to 8-hour shoot, up to 2 locations
fullDay.feature3: Planner support for timing and flow during shoot day

weddingDay.label: Package 3
weddingDay.name: Wedding Day Documentary
weddingDay.desc: Coverage from preparation to key reception moments.
weddingDay.feature1: Timeline coverage across ceremony and reception blocks
weddingDay.feature2: Early highlight delivery for immediate post-event use
weddingDay.feature3: Story-driven curation based on event sequence

PhotoServicePage.galleryIntro: Explore a few visual moods couples commonly choose for recent bookings.

look1.alt: Editorial wedding portrait with soft lighting
look1.caption: Minimal editorial mood focused on posing rhythm and soft light control.

look2.caption: Modern studio concept that emphasizes gown lines and natural expressions.

look3.alt: Classic wedding portrait with voluminous gown
look3.caption: Classic romantic setup suited for traditional album direction.

step1.title: Concept and budget alignment
step1.detail: We clarify style, location, wardrobe changes, and output goals before package confirmation.

step2.title: Detailed shoot schedule
step2.detail: Timeline is split by makeup, outfit switch, travel blocks, and best light windows.

step3.title: Shoot and delivery
step3.detail: After shooting, images are curated and delivered based on the agreed milestone timeline.

includedItems.item1: Concept planning, shot-list direction, and retouch mood alignment.
includedItems.item2: Photography crew based on package scope (photographer and basic support).
includedItems.item3: Final image files delivered by quantity listed in the selected package.

excludedItems.item1: Venue entry permits, special location fees, or venue-specific surcharges.
excludedItems.item2: Long-distance travel or overnight accommodation for remote shoots.
excludedItems.item3: Premium album printing or video production if not added separately.

PhotoServicePage.supportTitle: Need a quote tailored to your plan?
PhotoServicePage.supportDesc: Message us on WhatsApp or Zalo and we will suggest the best package for your timeline and budget.
